notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin doubles (7) on a fly ball to center fielder Trent Grisham.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas flies out to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Nick Loftin to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Starling Marte pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Starling Marte grounds out, third baseman José Caballero to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin pops out to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. J.C. Escarra out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.
